allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit with comprehensive security hardening \(62 findings fixed\)

Security audit identified 62 vulnerabilities across the Studyo multi-tenant
SaaS application. All code-fixable findings have been addressed including:
- Firestore-backed rate limiting replacing in-memory maps
- TOTP secret encryption \(AES-256-CBC\) at rest
- Real HWID validation via Python script comparison
- PayTR HMAC-SHA256 callback hash verification
- Firebase Auth token middleware on build server
- Path traversal prevention with allowed base paths
- Protocol whitelist for shell:openExternal
- Encrypted Google Drive tokens via Electron safeStorage
- Cross-tenant isolation fixes in Firestore rules and Cloud Functions
- Firebase App Check enforcement on all Cloud Functions
- Field whitelisting on all write operations
- Signed URLs replacing public Storage uploads
- Security headers on Firebase Hosting \(HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.\)
- Hardcoded credentials removed, env vars enforced
- subprocess shell=False in Python HWID generator
- sessionStorage replacing localStorage for license data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
